_doc: Owner payments collected 11.06-13.07.2026 (bank Registru Banca + petty-cash Registru Casa) against the April 2026 cycle. In the ledger these are represented per (BE,fund) by the balance-chain plug in ledger-2026-04.json (dueStart+charges-dueEnd). byUnitRegister = actual per-unit register receipts (audit). specialHandling = the 6 units whose transactions need cycle/penalty treatment; see memory kralik-debt-special-transactions.
